title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Wabash National India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Wabash National India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
